[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 1111101101 8
2 1101110000 5
3 1111100000 5
4 0111011101 7
5 0011000111 5
6 1111111011 9
7 1111011101 8
